Jason Gillespie Lifts Lid on Pakistan Cricket Board Controversy

Jan 3, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Jason Gillespie Lifts Lid on Pakistan Cricket Board Controversy

Former Australia pacer and Pakistan Test coach Jason Gillespie has spoken candidly about the circumstances that led to his abrupt resignation from the Pakistan cricket team. Gillespie, who took charge of Pakistan’s Test squad in 2024, revealed that a series of backstage incidents, including alleged humiliation by the Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB), influenced his decision to step down. His revelations highlight deeper issues within the PCB’s management and the ongoing instability of Pakistan’s cricket coaching structure.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Jason Gillespie Lifts Lid on Pakistan Cricket Board Controversy
